answers: Top manga: One Piece, Naruto, Attack on Titan, Dragon Ball, Death Note, Fullmetal Alchemist, Demon Slayer.
Manga vs comics: manga is Japanese, read right-to-left, typically black & white. Comics are western, left-to-right, color.
Read manga: MangaPlus (official, free), physical volumes, or library. Support creators by buying official releases.
Manga genres: shonen (action, for boys), shojo (romance, for girls), seinen (mature), josei (women's), and isekai (another world).

feelings.question: manga reading ki?
feelings.answer:
knowledge suggests that a user may prefer to read mangas over comics as they are Japanese-language works with black & white artwork, typically in right-to-left direction. The genre of mangas is diverse and includes shojo (romance), shonen (action), seinen (mature), and more, with subgenres such as seiyuu-meets-baka and others.
Regarding recommended series to watch or read  knowledge gathered above, a user would prefer the manga adaptations of popular shonen genres such as Death Note, Attack on Titans, Fullmetal Alchemist, One Piece, and DemoN Slayer.
